name: Glass fiber, reinforced polymer Bridge; Building Systems to USLCI
description: This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the USLCI repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process is "Glass fiber, reinforced polymer; at plant - US"
